speaker: Rick Dicker
text: File 82-712. Agent Rick Dicker interrogating. State your name, please.

speaker: Tony Rydinger
text: Uh... Tony... Tony Rydinger?

speaker: Rick
text: Tell me about the incident.

speaker: Tony
text: Well, there's this girl, um, in my class. I saw her at the track meet.
parenthetical: [off screen]

speaker: Tony
text: You're, uh, Violet, right?

speaker: Violet
text: That's me.

speaker: Tony
text: I sort of knew her, but she'd changed. Relaxed. She was more sure of herself. Cool, cute. I asked her out to a movie.

speaker: Tony
text: So, Friday?

speaker: Violet
text: Friday.

speaker: Tony
text: Friday.

speaker: Tony
text: And I went to watch the track meet. Not long after, this thing happened in the parking lot.
parenthetical: [o.s.] | [Suddenly, crashing and screaming as a gigantic mining drill with two blades comes out of the ground.]

speaker: Underminer
text: BEHOLD, THE UNDERMINER!!! I am always beneath you, but nothing is beneath me!

speaker: Tony
text: As if things aren't weird enough, I look over and I see these boots.

speaker: Underminer
text: I hereby declare war on peace and happiness! Soon all will tremble BEFORE ME!
parenthetical: [voice fades]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: You two, stay here.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Wait. Should we be doing this? It is still illegal.

speaker: Tony
text: They looked like superheroes.

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: We're gonna lose him.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Oh, all right. One of you patrol the perimeter, keep the crowds back and safe. The other, watch after Jack-Jack.

speaker: Violet
text: But I thought we were gonna go with...

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: You heard your mother. Trampoline me!
parenthetical: [to Violet] | [to Elastigirl] | [Elastigirl turns into a trampoline. Mr. Incredible jumps on her to get to the drill.]

speaker: Dash
text: I call perimeter!

speaker: Violet
text: You're not going anywhere, you little maggoty creep!
parenthetical: [creates force fields around Dash]

speaker: Tony
text: I see my chance to get out of there. But there's something familiar about one of the kids' voices. The girl, she's upset and she throws down her mask... and it's her!
parenthetical: [o.s.] | [Violet speaks indistinctly]

speaker: Violet
text: Oh. Tony! Hi. Uh, this isn't what you think it is.

speaker: Tony
text: It was just getting too freaky. I couldn't handle it and ran off. I feel kinda bad about it. Maybe I should've said "hi" or something? It's not her fault superheroes are illegal. And it's not like I don't like strong girls. I'm pretty secure... manhood-wise... What is that?
parenthetical: [o.s.] | [back onscreen]

speaker: Rick
text: Have you told anyone else about this? Your parents?

speaker: Tony
text: No, they'd only think I was hiding something. You know what I mean?

speaker: Rick
text: Sure, kid.

speaker: Tony
text: I like this girl, Mr. Dicker, I'm supposed to go out with her Friday night. Now, things are just gonna be weird. I wish I could forget I ever saw her in that suit.
parenthetical: [sighs]

speaker: Rick
text: You will, kid. You will.

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: COME ON!
parenthetical: [grunts] | [Mr. Incredible falls off the gigantic miner drill. The gigantic miner drill appears away, as the Underminer appears.]

speaker: Underminer
text: CONSIDER YOURSELF UNDERMINED!!!
parenthetical: [The explosions destroys the whole city apart while the Underminer continues to laugh.]

speaker: Underminer
text: Ooh.
parenthetical: [laughs] | [The Underminer tries to remove the money away to the agenda.]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Underminer! We meet again-- HUH!?!

speaker: Underminer
text: Oh, great! Now, he's on the agenda.
parenthetical: [The Underminer runs. The gigantic miner drill drives away. Mr. Incredible gets out and appears to the Underminer.]

speaker: Underminer
text: Incredible! Meet Jack Hammer!
parenthetical: [Mr. Incredible and the Underminer start fighting each other. Mr. Incredible throws the Underminer onto the controls, making them break. The drill starts going up and the Underminer gets into the container holding the money and escapes.]

speaker: Underminer
text: BUH-BYE!
parenthetical: [chuckles] | [The alarm blares. Mr. Incredible grunts and snatches the hook.]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: No no no no NO NO NO!

speaker: Dash
text: Everybody, stay back! Okay? Stay back!
parenthetical: [runs away]

speaker: Violet
text: You're not sticking me with babysitting!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: I can't steer it or stop it. And the Underminer's escaped!

speaker: Elastigirl
text: We'll have to stop it before-- BOB! The monorail!
parenthetical: [The monorail falls off. Frozone appears and uses ice to keep the monorail from completely falling off.]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Frozone! Yeah!

speaker: Elastigirl
text: We have to stop this thing before it gets to the overpass!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: I'll try to keep it away from the buildings!
parenthetical: [People continue to scream. Mr. Incredible pushes the drill to turn it. One of the blades pick up a car and throw it into the air.]

speaker: Dash
text: Hey, lady!
parenthetical: [The car crashes after Dash moves the old lady.]

speaker: Old Lady
text: Thank you so much, young man.
parenthetical: [Dash fixes her glasses] | [Jack-Jack cooing while being rolled in his stroller. He is then handed off to Dash]

speaker: Dash
text: What? VIOLET!
parenthetical: [While invisible, Violet goes through some steam before becoming visible. Mr. Incredible tries to stop the wheel from turning, but gets run over.]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: AH!
parenthetical: [grunting] | [Then, he tries to hold on to the wheel while dragging his feet. Elastigirl jumps on the road to stop traffic.]

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Stop! Everybody, stop!
parenthetical: [The cars stop.] | [The other cars stop.] | [The gigantic miner drill destroys the road. Mr. Incredible tries to stop the gigantic miner drill. Violet then uses her force field to save people from fall debris. While Mr. Incredible tries to stop the drill, a lamppost attached to some concrete falls right next to him. He picks it up and tries to use it to stop the drill. It ends up breaking.]

speaker: Dash
text: Heads up, Dad!
parenthetical: [gives Jack-Jack to Mr. Incredible.]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Dash!
parenthetical: [annoyed at his son]

speaker: Elastigirl
text: VIOLET! Who's watching Jack-Jack?!

speaker: Violet
text: Dash is watching him!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Violet, here, you take him!
parenthetical: [hands Jack-Jack to Violet] | [Elastigirl lands inside the gigantic miner drill and spots the boiler.]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: It's headed for City Hall!

speaker: Dash
text: Mom needs help!

speaker: Winston
text: They're out in public again! This is our chance! Follow them, follow Frozone!
parenthetical: [Frozone tries to freeze the gigantic miner drill. Elastigirl stretches herself out.]

speaker: Elastigirl
text: BOB! HELP ME WITH THE BOILER!
parenthetical: [straining] | [Mr. Incredible pushes the boiler out. Frozone tries to put an ice wall in front of the gigantic miner drill to buy time. Mr. Incredible and Elastigirl push the boiler out of place.]

speaker: Elastigirl
text: That should do it! WHAT ARE YOU KIDS DOING?! GET OUTTA HERE! THIS THING'S GONNA BLOW!
parenthetical: [gasps]

speaker: Violet
text: There's no time!
parenthetical: [Violet creates a giant force field around the Parr Family. The blade is just barely touching the top of city hall and then the police show up. Knowing he’d get in trouble, Frozone ran off.]

speaker: The Parr family
parenthetical: [laughs]

speaker: Dash
text: We did it!
parenthetical: [The top door opens and the Parr family look up.]

speaker: Officer
text: FREEZE, SUPERS!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Oh, what did we do?
parenthetical: [People exclaiming about the Parr Family getting arrested. Frozone goes to an ally way.]

speaker: Tommy
text: Excuse me! Mr...Zone?

speaker: Frozone
text: Sorry, but I'm not really supposed to be here.

speaker: Tommy
text: Which seems wrong... doesn't it? Perhaps you'd be interested in...changing that law?

speaker: Reporter
text: Superheroes including Frozone, Mr. Incredible, and Elastigirl caused further damage to the city. The Underminer remains at large.
parenthetical: [In the interrogation room, the officers look as two furious detectives scold Mr. Incredible and Elastigirl who furiously glare back at them, not liking what they were telling them.]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: WE DIDN'T start this fight!!
parenthetical: [angrily]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: No.

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: No.

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: NO!!!
parenthetical: [shouts with rage]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: You'd have prefer we'd do NOTHING?!
parenthetical: [outraged and disgusted]

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: You weren't much help.

speaker: Rick
text: You want out of the hole? First, you gotta put down the shovel.
parenthetical: [Later that day, the Parrs are riding to the motel in a black van. They all, excpet for Jack-Jack who is happily asleep, frown how their day had been.]

speaker: Bob
text: Well, that went poorly.

speaker: Violet
text: Dad, this is probably not the best time to tell you about this...but something else happened today with a kid...and my mask. Advertisement

speaker: Bob
text: Oh, hey, Rick. Violet thinks a friend of hers, a kid named Tony...might have seen her in the outfit, without her mask.

speaker: Rick
text: Talkative type?

speaker: Bob
text: Don't know. Last name is Rydinger.

speaker: Rick
text: Tony Rydinger. I'll check it out. Bob, Helen...a word if you don't mind. Uh, the program's been shut down.
parenthetical: [Bob starts to walk away]

speaker: Bob
text: What?
parenthetical: [shocked]

speaker: Rick
text: Politicians don't understand people who do good simply because it's right. It makes 'em nervous. They've been gunning for Supers for years. Today was all they needed. Anyway, I'm done. I'm afraid two more weeks in the motel is the best I can do for ya. It ain't much.

speaker: Helen
text: You've done plenty, Rick.
parenthetical: [Helen hugs Rick]

speaker: Bob
text: We won't forget.

speaker: Rick
text: Well, it has been a great honor working with you good people.

speaker: Bob
text: Thanks for everything, and good luck.
parenthetical: [Bob and Rick shake hands]

speaker: Rick
text: Yeah. You, too.

speaker: Violet
text: Did you wash your hands?

speaker: Violet
text: With... soap?

speaker: Violet
text: Did you dry them?
parenthetical: [Dash shakes his hands to dry them and then eats. Then Helen puts some food next to Dash.]

speaker: Dash
text: WHAT?! Is this all vegetables? Who ORDERED all vegetables?!

speaker: Helen
text: I did. They're good and you're gonna have some.
parenthetical: [She puts some vegetables on Dash’s plate.]

speaker: Violet
text: Are we going to talk about it?

speaker: Bob
text: What?

speaker: Violet
text: The elephant in the room.

speaker: Bob
text: What elephant?
parenthetical: [puzzled, about this "elephant" she spoke of]

speaker: Violet
text: I guess not then.

speaker: Helen
text: You're referring to today.

speaker: Dash
text: Yeah, what's the deal with today?

speaker: Helen
text: We all made mistakes. For example: you kids were supposed to watch Jack-Jack.

speaker: Violet
text: Babysitting, while you guys did the important stuff.

speaker: Helen
text: We talked about this. You're not old enough to decide about these things.

speaker: Violet
text: We are old enough to help out.

speaker: Dash
text: Yeah!!

speaker: Violet
text: Isn't that what you tell us, Dad?

speaker: Bob
text: Yeah, well, "help out" can mean many different things.

speaker: Violet
text: But we're supposed to help, if there's trouble.

speaker: Bob
text: Well, yeah, but...

speaker: Violet
text: Aren't you glad we helped today?

speaker: Bob
text: Yeah, I know but...

speaker: Violet
text: You said that you were proud of us.

speaker: Bob
text: Well, yeah, I was—AM!

speaker: Dash
text: We wanna fight bad guys!

speaker: Jack-Jack
parenthetical: [babbles mockingly, thinking they were playing]

speaker: Helen
text: No, you don't!

speaker: Violet
text: You said things were different now.

speaker: Helen
text: And they were...on the island. But I didn't mean that from now on...

speaker: Violet
text: So now, we gotta go back to "never using our powers!"

speaker: Dash
text: It defines who I am!

speaker: Bob
text: We're not saying you have... What?
parenthetical: [confused by what his son said]

speaker: Dash
text: Someone on TV said it.

speaker: Helen
text: Can we just eat the dinner, while it's hot?

speaker: Dash
text: Did we do something wrong?

speaker: Helen
text: Yes./Bob: No.
parenthetical: [Helen glares at her husband, but he refuses to accept changes]

speaker: Bob
text: We didn't do anything wrong.

speaker: Helen
text: Superheroes are illegal. Whether it's fair or not, that's the law.

speaker: Bob
text: The law should be fair. What are we teaching our kids?

speaker: Helen
text: To respect the law!

speaker: Bob
text: Even when the law is disrespectful?!

speaker: Helen
text: If laws are unjust, there are laws to change them! OTHERWISE, it's CHAOS!

speaker: Bob
text: Which is EXACTLY WHAT WE HAVE!
parenthetical: [booming] | [Helen slams the table, making food jolt. Bob takes a bite from an egg roll.]

speaker: Violet
text: I just thought it was kinda cool.

speaker: Helen
text: What was?

speaker: Violet
text: Fighting crime, as a family.

speaker: Helen
text: It was cool. But it's over. The world is what it is. We have to...adapt.
parenthetical: [sighs]

speaker: Dash
text: Are things...bad?

speaker: Helen
text: Things are fine.

speaker: Dash
text: May I be excused?
parenthetical: [eats faster] | [runs over; and watches TV]

speaker: Violet
text: How much longer in the motel, Dad?

speaker: Bob
text: Uh...

speaker: Helen
text: Not much longer, honey. Advertisement

speaker: Helen
text: What are we gonna do?

speaker: Bob
text: I don't know. Maybe Dicker will find something?

speaker: Helen
text: Dicker is done, Bob. Any thought we had about being Supers again is fantasy. One of us has gotta get a job.

speaker: Bob
text: “One of us"?

speaker: Helen
text: You did a long stint at Insuricare.

speaker: Bob
text: Hated every minute of it.

speaker: Helen
text: I know it was hard on you. Maybe it's my turn at in the private sector and you take care of the kids...

speaker: Bob
text: No, I'm doing this. I need to do this. You know where my suit and ties are?

speaker: Helen
text: Burned up when...

speaker: Both
text: The jet destroyed our house.

speaker: Helen
text: Yeah. We can't count on anyone else now, Bob. It's just us. We can't wait for—
parenthetical: (Helen and Bob hear a door bang. They look around for a bit and see someone coming.)

speaker: Lucius
text: No lifeguard on duty! Swim at your own risk.

speaker: Bob
text: Oh, where'd you go today? I noticed you missed all the "fun".

speaker: Lucius
text: Don't be mad because I know when to leave a party. I'm just as illegal as you guys. Besides, I knew the cops would let you go.

speaker: Helen
text: Yeah, in spite of Bob's best efforts.

speaker: Bob
text: Yeah, yeah, yeah.

speaker: Lucius
text: I heard the program shut down. How much longer are you in this motel?

speaker: Bob
text: Two weeks.

speaker: Lucius
text: Now, you know the offer still stands.

speaker: Helen
text: You're very generous, but there are five of us. We wouldn't do that to you and Honey.

speaker: Lucius
text: Well, door's always open. You know, the news isn't all bad. While you guys were being...detained, I was approached by a dude who represents this tycoon.

speaker: Bob
text: Winston Deavor.

speaker: Lucius
text: Wants to talk with me, with you two, about hero stuff. I checked him out. He's legit. Trained under Dicker. He wants to meet.

speaker: Helen
text: Ah, jeez! More superhero trouble. We just came from the police station, Lucius.

speaker: Bob
text: When?

speaker: Lucius
text: Tonight. I'm going there now.
parenthetical: [opens his jacket to reveal his supersuit underneath]

speaker: Helen
text: You enjoy, I'm sitting this one out.

speaker: Lucius
text: He wants all three of us.

speaker: Bob
text: Honey, let's just at least hear what he has to say.

speaker: Lucius
text: You got the address, I'll meet you guys there.

speaker: Helen
text: Go in our Supersuits?

speaker: Lucius
text: Yeah. Might wanna wear the old Supersuits. Got a feeling he's nostalgic.
parenthetical: [Helen and Bob are ready to leave and say bye to their kids.]

speaker: Violet
text: Where are you going?

speaker: Bob
text: The fresh air is especially good tonight.

speaker: Helen
text: If Jack-Jack wakes up...

speaker: Violet
text: I know the drill.
parenthetical: (As Bob and Helen walk out the door, Violet notices Helen’s boots before they close the door.)

speaker: Man
text: Your security badges. Please, this way. Hey, listen, you're my biggest fan.

speaker: Frozone
text: Good to see you.

speaker: Man
text: I'm-I'm your biggest fan. Shoot!
parenthetical: (They all go up in an elevator and then go into a room.)

speaker: Winston
text: I LOVE superheroes! The powers, the costumes, the mythic struggles. Winston Deavor. You can call me Win. Genuine pleasure to meet you. Frozone!

speaker: Frozone
text: It's good to see you.

speaker: Winston
text: Elastigirl.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Nice to meet you.

speaker: Winston
text: Mr. Incredible!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Hello.

speaker: Winston
text: 🎶 Mr. Incredible, Incredible, 🎶

speaker: Mr. Incredible and Winston
text: 🎶 Incredible. Catching the bad guys. Pow, pow, pow! 🎶

speaker: Winston
text: 🎶'Who's the cat Who's always chill, when survival odds Are close to nil? 🎶

speaker: Frozone and Winston
text: 🎶 Frozone, Frozone, Frozone! 🎶

speaker: Frozone
text: Yeah!
parenthetical: (Everyone laughs)

speaker: Winston
text: Can't tell you what a thrill this is. And this...

speaker: Evelyn
text: Oh, hello there, superheroes. I'm so sorry I'm late.

speaker: Winston
text: ...is my tardy sister, Evelyn.

speaker: Evelyn
text: And I'm scolding myself so you don't have to, Winston!

speaker: Winston
text: Spectacular. My father was so proud that I was even remotely connected to you guys. He used to call you the last line of defense. He was your top supporter. He donated to superhero causes. He raised money for the Dynaguy statue in Avery Park. He got to know many Supers personally. Even installed a phone with direct lines to Gazerbeam and Fironic in case of emergencies. He loved that, showed it off to everyone. He was heartbroken when you were all forced to go underground.

speaker: Evelyn
text: Father believed the world would become more dangerous without you.

speaker: Winston
text: He didn't know how right he was. There was a break-in. My father called Gazerbeam. The direct line. No answer. He called Fironic, no answer. Superheroes had just been made illegal. The robbers discovered him on the phone, and shot him. So...

speaker: Elastigirl
text: It must've been hard.

speaker: Evelyn
text: Especially for Mother. She died a few months later. Heartbreak.

speaker: Winston
text: If superheroes had not been forced underground it never would've happened.

speaker: Evelyn
text: Or Dad could've taken mom to the safe room as soon as he knew there was trouble.

speaker: Winston
text: I disagree strongly!! But we're not going into it right now. The point is nobody expected us to be able to actually run Dad's company. But with Evelyn as designer, and myself as operator uh, we threw ourselves into building Devtech into what it is today.

speaker: Frozone
text: A world-class telecommunications company.

speaker: Winston
text: Bigger than ever. Perfectly positioned to make some wrong things right. Hence, this meeting. Let me ask you something: What is the main reason you were all forced underground?

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Ignorance.

speaker: Winston
text: Perception. Take today for example, with the Underminer. Difficult situation. You were faced with a lot of hard decisions.

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Oh, tell me about it.

speaker: Winston
text: I can't. Because I didn't see it. Neither did anyone else. So, when you fight bad guys like today, people don't see the fight or what led up to it. They see what politicians tell them to see. They see destruction and they see you. So, if we wanna change people's perceptions about superheroes, we need you to share your perceptions with the world.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: How do we do that?

speaker: Evelyn
text: With cameras.

speaker: Winston
text: “We need you to share your perceptions with the world.”

speaker: Elastigirl
text: “How do we do that?”

speaker: Evelyn
text: We embed tiny cameras, like those, into your supersuits.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Wow, so small. And the picture is outstanding.

speaker: Evelyn
text: Thanks! Designed 'em myself.

speaker: Winston
text: We've got resources, lobbyists, worldwide connections and very important, insurance.

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Insurance is key.

speaker: Winston
text: All we need now are the super-est superheroes. It needs you three. Come on! Help me make all Supers legal again!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: This sounds great! Let's get this going. What's my first assignment?

speaker: Winston
text: That enthusiasm is golden. Now hold on to it. But for our first move, well, Elastigirl is our best play.

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Better than me?
parenthetical: (Annoyed, Elastigirl clears her throat)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: I mean, she's good. She-uh-Really, a credit to her...but uh, You know. You know.

speaker: Winston
text: With great respect let's not test the whole "insurance-will-pay-for-everything" idea on the first go 'round, okay?
parenthetical: (Frozone and Elastigirl try not to laugh.)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Wait a minute. You're saying what? I'm messy?

speaker: Winston
text: Well, Evelyn did a cost-benefit analysis comparing all your last five years of crime fighting before going underground, and Elastigirl's numbers are self-explanatory.

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Well, it's not a fair comparison! Heavyweight problems need heavyweight solutions.

speaker: Winston
text: Of course! We're gonna solve all kinds of problems together. After the perfect launch with Elastigirl!

speaker: Evelyn
text: So, what do you say?

speaker: Elastigirl
text: What do I say? I...don't know. Advertisement

speaker: Bob
text: What do you mean, you don't know? A few hours ago, you were saying it was over and being a superhero was a fantasy. Now, you get the offer of a lifetime and you don't know?

speaker: Helen
text: It's not that simple, Bob. I wanna protect the kids!

speaker: Bob
text: So, do, I.

speaker: Helen
text: From jail, Bob!

speaker: Bob
text: And how do you do that? By turning down a chance to change the law that forces them to hide what they are?

speaker: Helen
text: They haven't decided what they are. They're still kids.

speaker: Bob
text: Kids with powers, which makes them Supers whether they decide to use those powers or not. This will benefit them.

speaker: Helen
text: Look, it’s not a good time to be away. Dash is having trouble with homework, Vi is worried about her first date with that boy she likes, Tony, and Jack-Jack...

speaker: Bob
text: Jack-Jack? What's wrong with him?
parenthetical: [Helen shruggs. She had failed to notice Jack-Jack's powers since the first movie]

speaker: Helen
text: OK, nothing's wrong with Jack-Jack. But even a normal baby needs a lot of attention. I'm just not sure I can leave.

speaker: Bob
text: Of course you can leave. You've got to. So that I—we can be Supers again, so our kids can have that choice.

speaker: Helen
text: So you can have that choice.

speaker: Bob
text: All right, yes! So I can have that choice. And I would do a Great JOB! Regardless of what Deavor's pie charts say or whatever...But they want you. And you'll do a great...job...too.

speaker: Helen
text: Well, that was excruciating to watch. I can't lie to you. It's nice to be wanted. Flattering, you know, but...

speaker: Bob
text: But what's the choice? One, do this right, get well paid, we're out of the motel and things get better for all Supers, including our kids. Or two...I find a job in two weeks or we're homeless.

speaker: Helen
text: You know it's crazy, right? To help my family, I gotta leave it. To fix the law, I gotta break it.

speaker: Bob
text: You'll be great.

speaker: Helen
text: I know I will. But what about you? We have kids.

speaker: Bob
text: I'll watch the kids, no problem. Easy.

speaker: Helen
text: Easy, huh? You're adorable. Well, if there is a problem, I'll drop this thing and come right back.

speaker: Bob
text: You won't need to. I got it, you go do this thing. Do it so...I can do it better.
parenthetical: (At Devtech, the phone rings)

speaker: Winston
text: Deavor here.

speaker: Helen
text: This is Elastigirl. I'm in. Advertisement

speaker: Helen
text: Mr. Deavor, it's wonderful but it's too generous.

speaker: Winston
text: Nonsense! That's the least we can do. We're partners now! Can't have my partners living in a motel.

speaker: Helen
text: But w-whose house? Is it a house?

speaker: Winston
text: It's my house. I have several. I'm not using that one. Stay as long as you need.

speaker: Helen
text: I don't know what to say.

speaker: Bob
text: How about "thanks"?
parenthetical: (They enter the giant mansion.)

speaker: Dash
text: This is our new house?!

speaker: Helen
text: Okay, easy, tiger. It's being loaned to us.

speaker: Violet
text: This is homey.

speaker: Bob
text: Look at this place. Deavor bought it from an eccentric billionaire who liked to come and go without being seen so the house has multiple hidden exits.
parenthetical: (Dash starts using his super speed to explore the mansion.)

speaker: Violet

speaker: Screenslaver
text: Elastigirl doesn't save the day. She only postpones her defeat. And while she postpones her defeat you eat chips and watch her confront problems that you are too lazy to deal with. Superheroes are part of your brainless desire to replace true experience with simulation. You don't talk, you watch talk shows. You don't play games, you watch game shows. Travel, relationships, risk every meaningful experience must be packaged and delivered to you to watch at a distance. So that you can remain ever sheltered ever passive ever ravenous consumers who can't bring themselves to rise from their couches break a sweat and participate in life. You want superheroes to protect you and make yourselves ever more powerless in the process. While you tell yourselves you're being looked after. That your interests are being served. And your rights are being upheld. So that the system can keep stealing from you smiling at you all the while. Go ahead, send your Supers to stop me. Grab your snacks, watch your screens, and see what happens. You are no longer in control. I am.

text: I am joking, Robert. I enjoyed the assignment. He is bright and I am stimulating. We deserve each other. Your child is a polymorph. Like all babies, he has enormous potential. It is not unknown for Supers to have more than one power when young but this little one has many. Yes, you have many powers! I understand your lack of sleep and coherency, Robert. Babies can be anything, and your child is no exception. He has pure, unlimited potential, Robert. He slept while I worked in a creative fever. Auntie Edna stayed up all night making sure you look fabulous in your many forms.

speaker: Bob
text: What are you... You're putting him in the...

speaker: Edna
text: ...In the chamber, Robert. He is part of the demonstration and will be fine. Your challenge is to manage a baby who has multiple powers and no control over them, yes?

speaker: Bob
text: Huh. That sums it up.

speaker: Edna
text: I often work to music and I noticed the baby responds to it as well. Specifically, Mozart. I blended Kevlar with carbyne for durability under duress and cotton for comfort. Interwoven with these fabrics are a mesh of tiny sensors that monitor the baby's physical properties.

speaker: Bob
text: Oh, Lord! W-w-what is he doing?

speaker: Edna
text: Well, it's Mozart, Robert. Can you blame him? The important thing is that the suit and tracker anticipated the change and alerted you.

speaker: Bob
text: Oh, no. Cookies. I gotta get cookies!

speaker: Edna
text: You do not need cookies. As I learned quite painfully last night any solution involving cookies will inevitably result in the demon baby.
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack turns into the monster version of himself.)

speaker: Bob
text: "Combustion imminent"? What does that mean? Ahhh!!!

speaker: Edna
text: It means fire, Robert, for which the suit has countermeasures. I suggest you extinguish the baby's flames before he trips the sprinkler system.
parenthetical: (Bob presses the button making the fire extinguish with flame retardant)

speaker: Edna
text: The flame retardant is blackberry lavender, darling. Effective, edible, and delicious.

speaker: Bob
text: Well, what do you know? That is useful.

speaker: Edna
text: Although, I have doubtlessly exceeded your expectations for a single night's work the suit and device contain a few more features we need to discuss.
parenthetical: (Edna, Jack-Jack, and Bob go outside and into the car.)

speaker: Bob
text: Thanks again, E, for everything. How much do I owe you for?

speaker: Edna
text: Pish-posh, darling. Your bill will be covered by my fee for being Mr. Incredible, Elastigirl, and Frozone's exclusive designer throughout the known universe and until the end of time. But babysitting this one I do for free, darling.

speaker: Evelyn
text: I would resist the temptation to stretch. The temperature around you is well below freezing. Try to stretch and...you'll break.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: So, you're the Screenslaver.

speaker: Evelyn
text: Yes and no. Let's say, I created the character and pre-recorded the messages.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Does Winston know?

speaker: Evelyn
text: That I'm the Screenslaver? Of course not. Can you imagine what Mr. "Free Enterprise" would do with my hypnosis technology?

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Worse than what you're doing?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Hey, I'm using the technology to destroy people's trust in it. Like I'm using superheroes.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Who did I put in jail?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Pizza delivery guy. Seemed the right height, build. He gave you a pretty good fight. I should say I gave you a pretty good fight through him.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: But it doesn't bother you that an innocent man is in jail?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Eh, he was surly...and the pizza was cold.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: I counted on you.

speaker: Evelyn
text: That's why you failed.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: What?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Why would you count on me? Because I built you a bike? Because my brother knows the words to your theme song? We don't know each other!

speaker: Elastigirl
text: But you can count on me anyway.

speaker: Evelyn
text: I am supposed to, aren't I? Because you have some strange abilities and a shiny costume the rest of us are supposed to put our lives into your gloved hands. That's what my father believed. When our home was broken into, my mother wanted to hide. Begged my father to use the safe room. But father insisted they call his superhero friends. He died, pointlessly, stupidly...waiting for heroes to save the day.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: But why would you...your brother...

speaker: Evelyn
text: Is a child! He remembers the time when we had parents and superheroes. So, like a child, Winston conflates the two. "Mommy and Daddy went away because Supers went away." Our sweet parents were fools to put their lives in anybody else's hands. Superheroes keep us weak!

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Are you gonna kill me?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Nah. Using you is better. You're gonna help me make Supers illegal, forever.
parenthetical: (She turns on Elastigirl's goggles again. Elastigirl tries to resist it but gets hypnotized.)

speaker: Jack-Jack
text: Dada. Dada.

speaker: Bob
text: Ready? Laser eyes. Stop.

speaker: Dash
text: Wow!

speaker: Violet
text: Yeah! Yay, Jack-Jack!

speaker: Dash
text: Yeah, baby!

speaker: Bob
text: And that's not all. Watch this. Jack-Jack, blaster ready?
parenthetical: (Bob holds Jack-Jack like he's aiming and Jack-Jack shoots his lasers like a gun)

speaker: Bob
text: Pew, pew, pew, pew, pew.

speaker: Dash
text: No way.

speaker: Violet
text: That is crazy cool.

speaker: Dash
text: My turn. I get to blast him first!

speaker: Violet
text: Let me try. I want him.

speaker: Dash
text: Give him to me.

speaker: Bob
text: Hey, I'm just demonstrating. No firing the baby around the house, you understand? This is potentially dangerous and we're trying to teach him to control his powers, okay? Stop. See the screen.
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack goes into the other dimension)

speaker: Violet
text: He vanished! That's really cool!

speaker: Bob
text: Okay, good. Use the thing. That's the current readout. Click it. See the readout? Dimension four. See the shape? That's the room. See where he is in relation? So, where is he?

speaker: Dash
text: He's...there!

speaker: Bob
text: Okay. Come out. Num-num cookie?
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack comes back and Dash gives him a cookie)

speaker: Violet and Dash
text: Yay, Jack-Jack!

speaker: Bob
text: Yeah, Jack-Jack!

speaker: Violet
text: That's really cool.
parenthetical: (Bob hears his Incrediphone beeping. He to it and picks it up.)

speaker: Bob
text: Hello?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Elastigirl's in trouble.

speaker: Bob
text: What? What happened to her?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Sorry to tell you on the phone. Meet me on our ship at DevTech.

speaker: Bob
text: The ship at Devtech. I'll be there in 15 minutes.

speaker: Violet
text: What's at the ship at DevTech?
parenthetical: (Bob switches lines to Lucius)

speaker: Bob
text: Lucius? Bob. Helen's in trouble. I need someone to watch the kids. Suit up. It might get weird.

speaker: Lucius
text: I'll be there ASAP. Fifteen tops.

speaker: Honey
text: Where are you going ASAP?! You better be back ASAP! And leaving that suit!
parenthetical: (Bob comes out with his suit on)

speaker: Bob
text: I gotta go. I'll be home soon. Lucius will be here sooner. No firing the baby around the house, okay?

speaker: Violet
text: What's at the ship at DevTech? And why are you in your supersuit?!
parenthetical: (Bob drives to the ship at DevTech) | (Cuts to Dash in Bob's room taking the Incredibile remote. Violet comes in and Dash quickly hides the remote behind his back. Violet opens the dresser and grabs Dash, Helen, and her suits.)

speaker: Dash
text: Is that Mom's supersuit?

speaker: Violet
text: She may need it. You never know.

speaker: Dash
text: What's going on?

speaker: Violet
text: I don't know, but Dad called Lucius, after getting a call about Mom, and then left.

speaker: Dash
text: I thought you renounced superheroes.

speaker: Violet
text: Yeah, well, I renounce my renunciation. Put that on.
parenthetical: (Dash quickly puts on his supersuit. He then hears the doorbell and answers the door. He sees the wannabe supers with goggles on.)

speaker: Voyd
text: Hello there, "little fella".

speaker: Dash
text: Hello.

speaker: Voyd
text: You kids aren't safe. The Deavors sent us to take you...

speaker: Frozone
text: Well, isn't that redundant? The Deavors just sent me here to guard the house. Cause the kids aren't safe. I get it, managerial screw-up. Tell Winston I handled it. You understand, Ms...

speaker: Voyd
text: Voyd.

speaker: Frozone
text: Ms. Voyd. Drive safely.
parenthetical: (Dash presses the button to the remote and the Incredibile comes.)

speaker: Voyd
text: The thing is, he wants us to bring you, too.

speaker: Frozone
text: Hey. That isn't gonna hold them long! Dash, grab the baby!
parenthetical: (Violet and Dash quickly run to get Jack-Jack. The Supers break out of the ice.)

speaker: Voyd
text: Spread out!
parenthetical: (Dash comes out of Jack-Jack's room carrying him and runs out with Frozone and Violet. Then, He-Lectrix appears and they turn around. Brick appears on the other side so Frozone made an ice slide to get down to the first floor.)

speaker: Frozone
text: Dash! We gotta get to my car!
parenthetical: (Frozone pushes Krushauer back while Reflux put lava in front of Dash. Dash goes to a different direction but Screech breaks through the window. Dash turns around but instead of going upstairs, he goes through Voyd's portals making him go back to the other side of the room.)

speaker: Dash
text: What? What's going on?

speaker: Voyd
text: Little fella!
parenthetical: (Frozone pushes her back in her portal and then freezes one of Screech's wings making him unable to fly for a bit. He-Lectrix tries to electrocute the kids. Violet makes a force field. Krushauer makes Violet's force field shrink. Frozone tries to stop Krushauer but gets grabbed by Brick. Soon, the Incredibile comes through the wall.)

speaker: Dash
text: It worked!
parenthetical: (Frozone escapes from Brick and freezes He-Lectrix to the wall.)

speaker: Frozone
text: Incredibile, windows down! Dive in!
parenthetical: (The kids get in. Frozone avoids Brick but falls into one of Voyd's portals and Brick grabs him again. Frozone puts ice on her face.)

speaker: Frozone
text: Incredibile, set voice identification! Loudly, say your names!

speaker: Violet
text: Violet Parr!

speaker: Dash
text: Dashiell Robert Parr!
parenthetical: (Once again, Brick grabs Frozone but Screech puts the goggles on him.)

speaker: Dash
text: Lucius!
parenthetical: (Frozone scares the kids.)

speaker: Violet
text: Incredibile, escape!
parenthetical: (Frozone tries to stop the Incredibile with ice but the kids escape.)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Fill me in!

speaker: Evelyn
text: Good news and bad news. We found her. She seems physically fine but she's had an encounter with Screenslaver and she's acting kind of strange. In here.
parenthetical: (Mr. Incredible walks in a dark room with glowing blue goggles in the background)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Strange how?
parenthetical: (Elastigirl starts punching Mr. Incredible. Then she throws chairs at him, and then she kicks him multiple times. Then Mr. Incredible stops one of her kicks.)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Helen! Helen, what are you...?
parenthetical: (He tries to grab her but she dodges it. Then she wraps her arms and legs around him and starts choking him. Evelyn watches as she grabs something out of her jacket. Mr. Incredible soon gets a bit of control on Elastigirl.)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Helen, it's me!
parenthetical: (Elastigirl then kisses Mr. Incredible while she stretches her arm to grab the goggles Evelyn's holding. She grabs them and quickly puts them on Mr. Incredible.)

speaker: Violet
text: Incredibile, pull over. We can't go to E's. You saw those goggles they put on Lucius. They were wearing them, too. They're all under someone's control. They've probably done the same to Mom.

speaker: Dash
text: Okay. Bad guys after us. No Mom, no Dad. No Lucius. But we have our powers, this car and...what?
parenthetical: (Then, Jack-Jack slightly goes into the other dimension and then Dash and Violet realize they have Jack-Jack's powers. Dash gives them their masks and they put them on.)

speaker: Violet
text: Incredibile, take us to Devtech.
parenthetical: (Cuts to Voyd talking to Evelyn)

speaker: Voyd
text: The kids have escaped in a tricked-out car, but we got Frozone.

speaker: Evelyn
text: Bring him to the ship at Devtech immediately.
parenthetical: (Cuts to Incredibile)

speaker: Dash
text: Aw, we missed 'em! Oh, I wish the Incredibile could follow that boat.
parenthetical: (The Incredibile follows Dash's command)

speaker: Violet
text: What did you do?

speaker: Dash
text: I don't know.
parenthetical: (The Incredibile backs up)

speaker: Violet
text: What did you do?!

speaker: Dash
text: I didn't do anything!!
parenthetical: (Then, the Incredibile turns into a boat and goes into the ocean)

speaker: Dash
text: Wow, this car does anything I say.

speaker: Violet
text: We didn't plan this well.

speaker: Dash
text: What do you mean? We're here, aren't we?

speaker: Violet
text: Yes, we're here. We need to be up there.
parenthetical: (Points to the top of the ship)

speaker: Dash
text: Hey...what if the Incredibile has ejector seats?
parenthetical: (The Incredibile goes to the ejector seat setting)

speaker: Violet
text: Wait, what? No.

speaker: Dash
text: Yeah, baby!

speaker: Violet
text: No, don't say anymore...

speaker: Dash
text: Max power! Launch!
parenthetical: (Dash presses the button and they all fly up onto the ship)

speaker: Violet
text: Come on.

speaker: Winston
text: Hello! Glad you could come. Welcome to the conference.
parenthetical: (The camera goes down to see Elastigirl, Mr. Incredibles, and Frozone. Then, it cuts to the conference room.)

speaker: Winston
text: Our stars, where are they? The event's about to start.

speaker: Evelyn
text: They didn't want to upstage the others. They'll join for the signing.

speaker: Winston
text: Welcome, guests! You're in for a treat. This ship is the largest hydrofoil on the planet. So, hold onto something because we're going to open her up!
parenthetical: (The ship goes faster and the foils make it go higher)

speaker: Violet
text: We need to find Mom and Dad. Stay here. I'm gonna search for them.

speaker: Dash
text: Wait! Who's gonna watch Jack-Jack?

speaker: Violet
text: Suck it up. I won't be long.

speaker: Dash
text: Wait. Wait, but, but wait!

speaker: Violet
text: This is important. They are in trouble. It's up to us! To us! Understand? Keep him amused but quiet!

speaker: Dash
text: Ugh.
parenthetical: (Still invisible, Violet walks into the engine room and then into a hallway. She sees He-Lectrix and Krushauer with Elastigirl and Mr. Incredible.) | (Cuts to Dash who's having trouble stopping Jack-Jack from crying)

speaker: Dash
text: Shh! Quiet! Huh?
parenthetical: (Dash tries to get Jack-Jack be he walks through a wall)

speaker: Dash
text: Jack-Jack?
parenthetical: (Violet trips over a plant and Voyd and Screech notice. Violet quickly turns back invisible and runs away. Voyd goes over and sees footprints leading to Violet. Cuts to Dash trying to find Jack-Jack.)

speaker: Dash
text: Jack-Jack? Jack-Jack!
parenthetical: (Violet enters a hallway but then Voyd comes through a portal in front of her. Violet tries to run away but Voyd makes a portal under her to keep her from running. Violet goes invisible and kicks Voyd. Violet uses her force field to slam Voyd into the walls. Then, Voyd uses a fire extinguisher and sprays it on Violet so she can see her. Violet uses a force filed to protect herself but Voyd makes a portal to get inside the force field and punches Violet. Voyd is about to pounce on Violet but Violet makes a force field. Voyd makes a portal under Violet and Violet goes through. Voyd grabs Violet and pins her to the wall and tries to put the goggles on. Violet kicks Voyd back and then pushes off to the lower floor.)

speaker: Dash
text: Jack-Jack!

speaker: Violet
text: The mesmerized Supers know we're here but I found Mom and Dad...where's Jack-Jack? You lost him?! I gave you one thing to do!

speaker: Dash
text: The tracker! Use the tracker!
parenthetical: (Violet takes the tracker out of Dash's backpack and sees the Jack-Jack's going up)

speaker: Dash
text: He's going up?

speaker: Violet
text: He's in an elevator.

speaker: Dash
text: Let's go!
parenthetical: (The elevator stops at the kitchen and a man spots Jack-Jack)

speaker: Man
text: Hey, little baby. Where are your parents?
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack turns into his monster form and scares the man. Cuts to the conference room and Winston sees Elastigirl, Mr. Incredible, and Frozone walk in.)

speaker: Winston
text: And here they are, folks! The Supers who started this whole thing.

speaker: Evelyn
text: I told you they'd be there in time.

speaker: Winston
text: Hey, did you make them new masks?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Yeah. Night vision, et cetera. They look good, right?

speaker: Woman
text: So simple, even he can do it.

speaker: Evelyn
text: And we're back live in three, two, one...

speaker: Winston
text: This is a momentous occasion. We've all managed to accomplish something extraordinarily rare in today's world. We agree on something.

speaker: Winston
text: We agree to undo a bad decision. To make sure a few extraordinarily gifted members of the world's many countries are treated fairly. To invite them once again to use their gifts to benefit the world. I thank all of you for representing your nation's commitment to superheroes. With special thanks to Ambassador Selick. Yeah, it's okay. Let her hear you.

speaker: Ambassador
text: Thank you. Thank you so much.

speaker: Winston
text: Thank you, Ambassador, for your early and very crucial support. I can't think of anyone more deserving than you to be the first signature on the International Superhero Accord.
parenthetical: (The Ambassador signs the International Superhero Accord.)

speaker: Ambassador
text: There it is!
parenthetical: (Cuts to Dash and Violet in the elevator. Then, the door opens to see Jack-Jack in his fire form.)

speaker: Dash
text: HOLY COW!!

speaker: Violet
text: I know he's on fire! Just put him out!
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack's fire is put out and he laughs but Screech hears him. Violet looks out the window to see him running to the kitchen)

speaker: Violet
text: They're coming.
parenthetical: (Then, Screech, Voyd, and Krushauer come in. Then it cuts to the kids in the vents and Jack-Jack's holding the tracker.)

speaker: Dash
text: Is it okay to give him that?

speaker: Violet
text: I wasn't hearing any better ideas.
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack then laughs again causing the hypnotized Supers to know where they are.) | (Krushauer crushes one side of the vents, then the other side, and then he crushes the two sides together. Jack-Jack starts to grow then he come out of the vent, crushing the Supers. He plays with the tracker but then breaks it.)

speaker: Dash
text: No!
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack starts crying)

speaker: Violet
text: Come on, Jack-Jack. We have to go. Cookie num-num?
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack refuses and runs through the walls, going back to his original size. Violet and Dash run to catch up with Jack-Jack. they see him in a hallway.)

speaker: Jack-Jack
text: Mama, Mama.

speaker: Dash
text: I see him. He's getting away!

speaker: Violet
text: Stand back!
parenthetical: (Violet uses a force field to make the hole bigger so Dash can fit through. Dash tries to run after Jack-Jack but Jack-Jack goes through a wall.)

speaker: Dash
text: Darn it!

speaker: Violet
text: He's heading for Mom!

speaker: Winston
text: It is done. The world is super again! Group photo. Come on. Group photo, everyone. Squeeze in. That's it. Historic occasion. Everyone, smile.

speaker: Evelyn
text: Go on phase two.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Years of mandated and hiding and silence have made us bitter! You bring us into the light only to clean up the messes your lack of discipline creates!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Your bodies and your character are weak! Your promises are empty, and you will pay for it!

speaker: Frozone
text: We no longer serve you! We serve only us! May the fittest survive!
parenthetical: (Elastigirl stretches her arms and take down the camera.)

speaker: Chad
text: Well, we um...Some very alarming moments there before the, uh, technical difficulties. Please bear with us.
parenthetical: (Elastigirl, Frozone, and Mr. Incredible walk out and head to the bridge. Mr. Incredible throws the captain.)

speaker: Crew member
text: What? Mayday! Mayday! Mayday!

speaker: Evelyn
text: Hold! Let him talk.

speaker: Crew member
text: Superheroes have forcibly taken the bridge.

speaker: Evelyn
text: Now.

speaker: Crew member
text: Repeat. Superheroes have--AHH!
parenthetical: (Mr. Incredible throws him across the room causing him to knock out the other crew member. Mr. Incredible takes out the part of the controls where the emergency line is and throws it out of the bridge. Elastigirl keeps turning the ship until Evelyn tells her to stop.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: A little further. Little further. Stop.
parenthetical: (The ship is now going toward the city. Then Mr. Incredible crushes the steering wheel.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: What the... a baby?
parenthetical: (Violet and Dash get in.)

speaker: Dash
text: Mom and Dad! Uncle Lucius?
parenthetical: (Elastigirl, Mr. Incredible and Frozone try attacking Dash, Violet and Jack-Jack but Violet puts up a force field.)

speaker: Jack-Jack
text: My mama.

speaker: Violet
text: Jack-Jack! No!
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack floats to Elastigirl and she holds him.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: A Super baby?
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack starts to take off Elastigirl's goggles with his mind)

speaker: Evelyn
text: No, no, no! Put him down!
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack completely takes off the goggles and Elastigirl is back to normal.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: Grab her!

speaker: Elastigirl
text: No! Hold Jack-Jack.
parenthetical: (Elastigirl avoids Frozone's ice and takes his goggles off. She avoids Mr. Incredible's punches and takes his goggles off, while Mr. Incredible rips the supersuit. Elastigirl steps on the goggles to destroy them.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: No!
parenthetical: (Mr. Incredible goes into a fighting a position toward Elastigirl.)

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Hey, it's me!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Yeah, that's what I thought last time.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Kids, what are you...you came for us?

speaker: Violet
text: Don't be mad.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Oh, sweetie, how could I be mad? I'm proud.

speaker: Frozone
text: Not to break up a tender moment, but where are we? Is this DevTech's ship?

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Evelyn Deavor controls the Screenslaver and until a second ago, us. Where's the crew?
parenthetical: (Frozone and Mr. Incredible look behind them to see the crew unconscious.)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Uh-oh. Did I do that?

speaker: Violet
text: Mom, the suit? Try this.
parenthetical: (Meanwhile, the other suits cams on the hynotzied wannabes all immediately came on, as things were being taken to the extreme with Evelyn.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: Phase Three. Go on Phase Three!
parenthetical: (All wannabe Supers obey and head off to take down the other Supers.)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Why are the kids here? You didn't go to the house?

speaker: Frozone
text: I went to the house. You didn't escape? How did you not escape?!

speaker: Violet and Dash
text: Hey! We just saved you!
parenthetical: (Elastigirl takes Jack-Jack)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Escape?! Escape from who?!
parenthetical: (Brick opens the door while a portal from Voyd appears letting He-Lectrix and Voyd come in)

speaker: Frozone
text: Those guys!
parenthetical: (Elastigirl tries to keep back protecting Jack-Jack until he turns into his monster form)

speaker: Elastigirl
text: What the--?! Jack-Jack has powers?!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: We know! Fight now, talk later!
parenthetical: (Mr. Incredible tries to punch Brick but she punches him first.) | (Then, Elastigirl tries to punch and kick Voyd but Voyd creates portals to keep the punches away. She puts one near Elastigirl which causes her to punch herself.) | (He-Lectrix tries to electrocute Dash but Dash is too fast. Then Violet puts a force field around He-Lectrix causing him to electrocute himself.) | (Elastigirl finally punches Voyd and takes her goggles off and steps on them. Jack-Jack then leaps on He-Lectrix and destroys his goggles. Screech comes in while carrying Reflux. He drops him off on inside the bridge. He shoots lava and Violet puts a force field around her and Dash.) | (Then, Frozone comes and fights the lava. He pushes Reflux off the controls and takes his goggles off. Then Screech comes in and takes Dash. Violet quickly takes Jack-Jack.)

speaker: Violet
text: Jack-Jack. Laser eyes! Pew, pew, pew, pew.
parenthetical: (Violet shoots Jack-Jack's laser eyes and one of them hit Screeches wing, causing him to fall. Screech screeches at Dash and Dash rapidly kicks him in the head. He gets up and runs around Screen, making Screech's head turn around in a circle. Then Dash punches the goggles making them break.)

speaker: Dash
text: Ah-ha!
parenthetical: (Mr. Incredible is about to punch Brick but Brick stops it and pins him to the wall and is about to punch him. Elastigirl quickly wraps her arms around Brick's neck and pulls her back, giving Mr. Incredible a change to punch her glasses off.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: Ugh.

speaker: Evelyn
text: Come with me, Winston.

speaker: Winston
text: Did I faint?

speaker: Evelyn
text: You'll be safe here.

speaker: Winston
text: Safe?! Safe from what? Where are the diplomats? Th-the Supers?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Still hypnotized.

speaker: Winston
text: What have you DONE?!
parenthetical: (Everyone in the bridge sees the plane is about to take off.)

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Evelyn, she's escaping!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Well, go after her. Finish your mission.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: I can't just go! What about the kids? Jack-Jack, who's gonna...

speaker: Violet
text: Mom! Go. We've got this.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Voyd, come with me.
parenthetical: (Voyd and Elastigirl run out)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: I'll go shut down the engine.

speaker: Frozone
text: I'll try to slow the ship from the bow.

speaker: Dash
text: Wait, someone's missing. W-w-where's the crusher guy?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Strap in now!
parenthetical: (Cuts to Voyd and Elastigirl climbing the stairs quickly. Then it cuts to Krushauer moving pipes to stop Mr. Incredible from getting into the engine room. Then it cuts to Frozone trying to slow down the ship. Then it cuts back to Winston and Evelyn.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: It's for your own good.

speaker: Winston
text: NO! THIS IS!
parenthetical: (Mr. Incredibles then gets Krushauer's goggles off by throwing one pipe into his face. Elastigirl and Voyd get to the top but Evelyn already took off.)

speaker: Voyd
text: We're too late!

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Get me up to the jet!
parenthetical: (Voyd makes a portal above the plane and Elastigirl jumps in, but Elastigirl misses the plane.)

speaker: Voyd
text: No!
parenthetical: (Voyd makes another portal below Elastigirl and she falls in. She very roughly lands on top of the plane but there isn't anything to grab on to so she falls off. Voyd makes another portal and Elastigirl goes through. The other portal was below the plane, making Elastigirl go up and hit the bottom of it. Voyd makes another portal that that's inside the plane. Elastigirl stretches her arm to grab something and got inside. Then cuts to Mr. Incredible trying to move the pipes with his strength but to no use.)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Hey, you did this. Can you undo it?

speaker: Krushauer
text: You want me to un-crush?

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: What? No one's ever asked for that?

speaker: Krushauer
text: No. To un-crush is silly. Why un-crush?

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: To get into the engine room--Oh, forget it. We don't have enough time.

speaker: Krushauer
text: What if I said to un-punch someone? What do you do?
parenthetical: (Evelyn notices the hatch door is open knowing that Elastigirl got on)

speaker: Evelyn
text: Welcome aboard, Elastigirl. Although we haven't yet reached our cruising altitude... ...feel free to roam about the cabin! Or just relax and let the cabin roam about you!
parenthetical: (Cuts to Frozone and Violet looking at the city, then, Mr. Incredible and Dash run out with Dash holding Jack-Jack.)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: I can't get to the engine room!

speaker: Frozone
text: Well we gotta do something! Because trying to slow it down ain't working.

speaker: Dash
text: Hey! What about turning the boat?

speaker: Mr. Incredible and Frozone
text: The steering's been destroyed!

speaker: Violet
text: Dash means from the outside!

speaker: Dash
text: Yeah!

speaker: Violet
text: If we break off one of the foils and turn the rudder, we can veer the ship away from the city!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: That might work.

speaker: Frozone
text: I'll turn the front, you turn the rear.

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Using the rudder? That's underwater! How am I supposed to get--all right. Come on, kids.

speaker: Violet
text: Dad! I know this is going to work. But, if it doesn't, and we crash, my shields are probably better protection than the ship. I should stay here. With Jack-Jack.

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: That's my girl.

speaker: Frozone
text: Remember, Bob, we're both turning right!
parenthetical: (Cuts back to Evelyn and Elastigirl. Evelyn puts on an oxygen mask while Elastigirl tries to get to her, while barely being able to walk.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: You know what's sad? If it weren't for your core beliefs, I think we could've been good friends.
parenthetical: (Elastigirl attempts to get to Evelyn but keeps falling because there isn't enough oxygen)

speaker: Elastigirl
text: At least I ha...have core beliefs.
parenthetical: (Cuts to the news)

speaker: Chad
text: We have breaking news. While there is still no radio contact, the ship has changed direction and is heading towards land at a high rate of speed.
parenthetical: (Cuts to Dash and Mr. Incredible)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: So, Dash. I am going to the rudder. Once I turn the ship, you hit the pull up button.

speaker: Dash
text: Okay, Dad!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Now lower me-- --DOWWWNN!!!
parenthetical: (Cuts back to Evelyn and Elastigirl.) | [screams]

speaker: Evelyn
text: The reputations of superheroes are ruined. You will never become legal. Ever.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Never?

speaker: Evelyn
text: No.
parenthetical: [laughs]

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Ever?

speaker: Evelyn
text: No.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: Not even a little smidgee-widgee?

speaker: Evelyn
text: Oh, hypoxia. When you don't have enough oxygen, things seem really silly.
parenthetical: (Mr. Incredible is trying to get to the rudder and narrowly avoids the blades.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: Things get sillier and sillier and then you die.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: I don't wanna die.
parenthetical: [laughs]

speaker: Evelyn
text: Ah, nobody does.
parenthetical: (She kicks Elastigirl farther away.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: Really. Not such a bad way to go.
parenthetical: (Elastigirl spots the flare gun and shoots Evelyn's oxygen tank with it, making her go through the window.) | [chuckles wickedly]

speaker: Winston
text: Everyone, we need to get to the back of the ship! All Supers, protect your ambassadors!

speaker: Brick
text: Follow.
parenthetical: (Cuts to outside of the boat)

speaker: Dash
text: Dad's been underwater for too long!
parenthetical: (Cuts to Elastigirl trying to get close to where Evelyn was falling. She then puts the plane on auto pilot and then gets ready to launch herself. Then cuts back to Dash.)

speaker: Dash
text: We gotta pull him up!

speaker: Violet
text: Wait. It's too soon!
parenthetical: (Elastigirl launches herself and catches Evelyn and makes a parachute. Then cuts back to Dash.)

speaker: Dash
text: I'm gonna press the button!

speaker: Violet
text: Not yet!
parenthetical: (Mr. Incredible pushes the rudder. Elastigirl is trying to hold onto Evelyn but Evelyn kicks her in the face, causing her to let go. Then Mr. Incredible turns the rudder all the way.)

speaker: Violet
text: It's turning. It's working!

speaker: Frozone
text: Now!

speaker: Violet
text: Dash, now!
parenthetical: (Dash pushes the button making Mr. Incredible go back up. Elastigirl is trying to catch up to Evelyn so she can catch her again.)

speaker: Voyd
text: Save yourself. Make a chute. Make a chute. Make a chute. MAKE THE CHUTE!!
parenthetical: (Elastigirl and Evelyn goes through the portal and onto the ship.)

speaker: Frozone
text: HELEN! BRACE YOURSELVES!
parenthetical: (Frozone breaks the foil making the ship turn. Elastigirl catches Violet, Jack-Jack, and Dash.)

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: CRASH POSITIONS!
parenthetical: (Frozone puts a bunch of snow to minimize damage to the city. The ship goes on top of the road on the snow.)

speaker: Elastigirl
text: I missed Jack-Jack's first power?!

speaker: Mr. Incredible
text: Actually, you missed the first
parenthetical: (Jack-Jack then duplicates himself) | (Everyone is cheering for the Supers and then cuts to Evelyn getting arrested.)

speaker: Evelyn
text: The fact that you saved me doesn't make you right.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: But it does make you alive.

speaker: Winston
text: And I'm grateful for that.

speaker: Elastigirl
text: I'm sorry, but she'll go to prison.

speaker: Violet
text: Well, I'm sorry she's rich and will probably get no more than a slap on the wrist.

speaker: Winston
text: First of all, Violet, I like you. And who knows what the future may bring, but I have a good feeling about all of you.

speaker: Frozone
text: Hmm. Good feeling. Should we be worried?
parenthetical: (Mr. Incredible chuckles)

speaker: Elastigirl
text: You guys got the next shift. I'm beat.

speaker: Voyd
text: I saw what you did back there. That was incredible! No pun intended.

speaker: Violet
text: Sorry, I had to punch you.
parenthetical: (Mr. Incredible turns around to see the Incredibile come and the remote in Dashes hand.)

speaker: Dash
text: Yeah, baby! My sweet ride!
parenthetical: (Cuts to Frozone, Elastigirl, and Mr. Incredible walking into city hall.)

speaker: Judge
text: And in recognition of the extraordinary service they have demonstrated, the legal status of superheroes is hereby restored.
parenthetical: (The Supers are happy that Supers are legal again.)

speaker: Violet
text: You don't know me, do you?

speaker: Tony
text: No, I don't...wait. Are you the girl with the water--?

speaker: Violet
text: I'm Violet Parr!!

speaker: Tony
text: I'm Tony.
parenthetical: (Cuts to Tony running outside to get in the Parr's car.)

speaker: Violet
text: Tony, this is my mom.

speaker: Helen
text: Pleased to meet you.

speaker: Violet
text: This is my dad.

speaker: Bob
text: Oh, we've met.

speaker: Violet
text: And this...is embarrassing.

speaker: Dash
text: Charmed, I'm sure.

speaker: Violet
text: My little brother, Dash. And the baby is Jack-Jack. I tried to limit it to one parent.

speaker: Helen
text: We're all going to a movie, too, Tony. Don't mind us.

speaker: Bob
text: We'll be sitting on the other side of the theater. Not watching you.

speaker: Violet
text: He's kidding. They are only dropping us off at the theater. They have other things to do!

speaker: Tony
text: So, you guys are close, I guess.

speaker: Violet
text: Yeah, I guess.

speaker: Bob
text: We can get closer!

speaker: Helen
text: Bob!
parenthetical: (They stop in front of the theater but see criminals pass shooting guns. The Parrs look at each other and confuses Tony.)

speaker: Violet
text: STOP! Let us out! Here, large popcorn, small soda. Save me a seat, center, about eight rows back. I'll be back before the previews are over!
parenthetical: [The family puts on their masks and Bob's car reveals his Incredibile, as the Incredits 2 play.]
